metadata.title: Follow-Up: Emily Nelson x Careerspan • Zo + co-founder resources

commitments.Deliverable: Introduce Speaker 2 to Zo Computer founders
commitments.Context/Why: Facilitate deeper relationship + potential collaboration opportunities; Zo team actively seeking builders on their ecosystem

commitments.Deliverable: Share Howie tagging system setup instructions
commitments.Context/Why: Speaker 2 tried Howie but found it frustrating; Vrijen's custom tag system solves the back-and-forth problem she experienced

commitments.Deliverable: Sign up for Zo using Vrijen's referral code
commitments.Context/Why: Get 50% discount on API costs + test platform for suitability given co-founder loss situation
commitments.Dependencies: Receive referral code (sent in chat during meeting)

commitments.Deliverable: Explore YC Founder Match and Coffee Space
commitments.Context/Why: Find technical co-founder or "co-thinker" to replace Brandon's product intelligence role
Validate whether contractor can connect existing components (LinkedIn builder, resume builder, RAG system) into working MVP

commitments.Deliverable: Get second technical opinion on contractor scope
commitments.Context/Why: Validate what's reasonable to expect with $2k budget and assess contractor's technical capabilities independently
commitments.Dependencies: Find another technical person to consult

quotes.text: I feel like I'm going through a divorce right now. I miss Brandon.
quotes.speaker: Speaker 2, 11:10
quotes.context: Describing emotional impact of losing ML engineer who left for $1.2M raise + competing offers

quotes.text: We're little babies in this big tech world. But I think to the extent that luckily tools like this at least level the playing field a little bit.
quotes.speaker: Vrijen, 11:30
quotes.context: Empathizing with helplessness of non-technical founders after technical co-founder loss

quotes.text: Angel investing is gambling for rich people... instead of gambling on the ponies, you're gambling on a young person's hopes and dreams.
quotes.speaker: Vrijen, 11:50-12:14
quotes.context: Reframing fundraising power dynamics to reduce intimidation factor

quotes.text: All right, where do I sign up?
quotes.speaker: Speaker 2, 09:09
quotes.context: Immediate response after learning N8N can be self-hosted natively on Zo

quotes.text: There's a gap between what I know and what the Filipino guy knows. Like, I don't know if he's gonna be getting me the best results.
quotes.speaker: Speaker 2, 16:13
quotes.context: Explaining concern about offshore contractor despite good documentation

questions.text: Should I just like be vibe coding something and like tossing it out there?
questions.context: Core strategic fork - pivot to solo vibe-coding vs. continue seeking technical collaborator vs. raise funding for engineer

questions.text: Should I go for investment? I don't know... I think I really don't want that. But I also feel like I need a co-founder.
questions.context: Resource constraint forcing trade-off between independence (bootstrap) and capacity (raise to hire)

questions.text: What do you not like about [Howie]?
questions.context: Surface specific friction points to provide concrete solution (tagging system), not generic dismissal

profile.name: Emily Nelson
profile.standout_quote: I feel like I'm going through a divorce right now. I miss Brandon.

deliverables.item: YC Founder Match + Coffee Space links
